description: Private end unit townhome with a large fenced yard and deck siding onto tranquil greenspace. 3 bedroom, 2 bathrooms with a beautifully renovated kitchen with white cabinets, quartz counters, gas stove and S/S appliances. Warm gas F/P bright living room. Office plus 2 bedrooms upstairs. Another bedroom & laundry on main. Small, well run complex near Mundy Park, shopping, & good schools. Bonus is 700 square foot crawl space with over 6' ceilings.
